transcript.text:
(This place has a nice ambiance...)
(It's Korea's first restaurant, ‘La Cantina’)
Is this all for 1 person?
Stop lying
(In the first restaurant... She's here to be the first one...)
(With these fancy food...)
That's right, lobster should be eaten with your hands
(A pretty down-to-earth meal...)
(ONE bowl...)
(TWO bowls...)
(With both luxury and down-to-earth charms...)
(We're here for some Western food in a while)
Hello, everyone
I'm at Eulji-ro today
This is a restaurant
that opened in 1967

It's the first Italian restaurant in Korea!
(Counting the number of years...) If it's in 1967, how old is it?
It's been 57 years, so it's really old
Hearing it's the first Italian restaurant in Korea
I'm really curious about the taste
Here's the menu!
(Welcomed by a variety of menus...)
(Located in Jung-gu, Seoul)
('La Cantina')
(Enters) Hello
(Luxurious interior with classic and modern designs)
(The menu is here!) Thank you
What is this? Isn't this too much?
The blue sticker indicates the popular menu items
- Is it the best menu items? - Yes
(So many options, so much to choose...) What's your recommendation?

There are too many options
(The best soup in the area!) The 'onion soup' is a popular dish
The cream pasta is also often enjoyed
(There are a lot of steaks...!)
And it's not on the menu, but...
(Quite an unusual name...) there's a steak on the Samsung Course
It’s tenderloin topped with garlic
What's the Samsung Course?
(A course meal with popular dishes with bread, salad, soup, pasta, steak, and dessert!)
(Start) Then I'll order!
I'll have one onion soup
(Tagliatelle Pescatore) Tomato seafood pasta
(Tagliatelle Cantina) The cream pasta
(Vongole ala Siciliana) I'll have this vongole pasta
Appetizer vongole
(Bistecca Con Aragosta) No.10-1, tenderloin+lobster!

(Bistecca Aladiana) No.10-9, the tenderloin steak that you recommended earlier
(Scampi alla o latte) No. 8-4, king prawn pasta
That's it!
(The first restaurant in Korea retained its original appearance...)
('La Cantina')
(Jeong Kwon-taek / Chef / Appx. 50 years of experience) (And the chef of ‘La Cantina’ worked for 50+ years)
(The food tastes just like how it was 50 years ago...!)
It's not for 3-4 people, but just one?!
(Even a chef with 50 years of experience has never seen this amount of orders... )
(Food is here) Looks delicious! Is this the vongole?
Thank you
This is the onion soup
- Okay - It's very hot
Okay, thank you
Thank you
This is the steak and lobster

Thank you
(Ta-da) The lobster's buttery smell is so strong
Bon appétit! I'm so excited
(Table filled with the vintage luxury vibes) The way it is served and all, it really feels like an old restaurant
It really has that vibe back in the days
This is the onion soup
Onion soup?
Oh, that looks so interesting
Delicious
(Cheese in the soup!) What is this...? Cheese?
There's mozzarella and bread
Wow, it's delicious, what is this...?
It's not a thick soup, it's watery
(A hint of Korean cousine in the Western food...) It's like beef soup...
It's delicious!
(One bowl of rice plz... lol) I want to add rice in here...

(Undebatable taste!!) It's so amazingl! Delicious
Let's try this lobster!
Oh, there's a fork for it, too
Do I dig it in like this?
How am I supposed to eat this?
So good!
The lobster's claws are hard to taste good
But this one tastes great
(Savory to the inside of the claws) It's nicely seasoned, it's salty and delicious
Is this how you eat at a restaurant?
(No, I don't think so...)
(Somebody please help her... haha) How am I supposed to eat this?
(An angel customer at the next table!) There's a long spoon of that, dig into it
(+Eating knowledge) Am I supposed to dig it?
(It's okay, it's not a sin not to know... haha) I'm supposed to dig it, I ate it the wrong way
Wow, it’s seasoned so well inside!

It's nicely salty and delicious
How can the claws be so good?
It's so delicious
(Super excited) I'm really looking forward to the body
(Looks frustrated haha) I want to eat cleanly, but it's difficult
Let's have the steak for now! I asked for gloves
I'll give the steak a taste first
It cuts very smoothly
The meat is super tender...
It's so smooth...
(The gloves have finally arrived!)
Thank you!
(Gotta tear off the meat hehe) That's right, lobster should be eaten with your hands
Looks so delicious!
It's really chewy
and nicely seasoned

(The ideal butter-grilled lobster...) This is perfected grilled
There are guts inside the head
(Scrape it off...) Let's eat it up
Look at this...!!
It's so good!
(Put it aside for the next meal) Let's take this off for now
Next dish! Let's try the pasta
The cream pasta first
The pasta is green, isn't it cool?
The cream tastes so unique and good
Is this flavor from the pasta, not the cream?
It's like...
It has a strong potato scent
It's delicious
What kind of pasta is this?
It's so chewy and good

(She's sincerely enjoying it without a word... haha)
I'm almost done with the pasta!
(Out!) Isn't this parsley? I can't eat it
(Next up is the king prawn pasta!) How does this taste?
I think it has a lot of garlic in it
The smell of garlic is really strong!
It's oil pasta
The garlic smell is so strong, it can be called as ‘garlic pasta’
Delicious! The prawns are huge!
(Oh no, protect the guts!!!) The guts are oozing out!!
Dip it in the oil
(It's so flippin' tasty...)
(No time for formality... )
All the dishes are delicious!
Everybody will love the food here!
So good!

It's a little tangy, too
I think it's good to eat like a soup
This time I'll try the tomato pasta
They don't stir-fry the pasta with the sauce
(As it was 57 years ago) They serve them separately like the old days
It's been a long time since I've eaten pasta like this
(Whole scallops!) It has a whole scallop in it?
It's so nicely cooked!
It's not tough at all
The texture is so plump and nice
(Let's remove the shell!) I'll just remove the mussels
It's a bit...
It's different from the gooey, thick tomato sauce
It's a bit watery
and has a bit of spices in it
This place's vibe...

it's just like what old restaurants are like
Like a restaurant of memories?
(The orange juice cup also brings back memories...)
There's a lot
of pasta
(She's talking about this one lol) I need to try this one quickly as well
But what's this yellow sauce on top?
Onion!
(Under the sauce lays the...) There are two pieces of steak
Two pieces of tenderloin steak
This tastes bit...!
(The familiar taste that the brain recalls...) It's familiar... What is is?
(But she couldn't remember it...)
(Onion soup CLEAR!)
Nice!
You're drinking it like hangover soup... haha

(24H onion soup restaurant)
There's another whole scallop!!
So delicious
That's a lot of food...!
(Poke!) Tenderloin!
(She knows how to eat...) Let's dip it in the cream sauce
It's so good!
Thinking about it
I haven't filmed a mukbang in this kind of restaurant
It's so good, let's do it more often
(The long-awaited vongole pasta!) I had a bite of this earlier, it was so good!
(The appetizer she ordered doesn't have pasta!) I think this one's the best for today
It's so delicious!
Actually, this is the Samsung building
It is said that Lee Byung-chul, former chairman of Samsung, visited here often
(He enjoyed this vongole every time he visited...!) I saw an article that said he liked this the most

If I add pasta to this appetizer, it's vongole
The clams are so delicious!
I'll try a bite
Wow, the vongole is so nice
I've seen a lot of clam or iron clams in the vongole
But this is ocean quahog!!
Even with this amount of oil, it's not heavy at all
Prawn
The meat is so tender
The meat is super soft...
(Should I start finishing it...???) Should I clear them one by one now?
(Planning how to eat...) The cream sauce can be used as a dip, so let's eat it later
(First victim) Let's first go for the tomato
(Tomato pasta CLEAR!)
Delicious!
King prawn pasta

(Lobster time is back!) It's time to rip off the lobster again
(Putting on gloves and taking apart the lobster...)
I wonder if this lobster
will taste good with the steak
(Delicious food + delicious food...!)
(Hands clasped together and savoring the food haha)
I worried if eating all these expensive food would taste bad together, but it's delicious
Ocean quahog
So delicious
(Displaying an advanced maneuver at the restaurant)
(The cream pasta she saved up for...!)
('La Cantina' ALL CLEAR!) I ate it all!
(I guess she's still going to drink the vongole broth... )
You're amazing... haha
I've been here for 32 years now
The restaurant is 57 years old...

I've never seen anything like this in my 32 years... haha
You're simply amazing...
The crew in our kitchen
went and cooked as dedicated chefs
when Chairman Lee Byung-chul moved to Taepyeongro
- Really? - Yes
(How they stayed consistent for 57 years!) Then this taste must’ve been the same back then
I've been to a lot of long-established stores,
but it's my first time at a long-established restaurant
But the fact that you kept the same flavor
for over 50 years is really admirable
Even the vibe and taste were both great
It was a great time to relive old memories
Thanks for the food today!
